name: Fill in the Blank (FIB)
qcPdf: Author Test Cases - FIB test cases.pdf
architectureNote: Standard FIB (templates/fib/) — assessment widget dropped into a Generic Step column. dataType 'fill-in-the-blank'. Distinct from FIB Media (fibWithImage mode). Reusable FIB commands live in support/commands.ts (cy.ensureFibDeepSetup, cy.openFibSettings, cy.insertFibBlank, etc.) and are shared with this component suite.

coverage.note: 30 QC IDs mapped to authoring-side automation (some it() blocks cover 2 QC IDs); 29 deferred (Preview/Reader, persistence, a11y, file-picker, runtime caps).
